docs.title: Personnel Screening Policy
docs.screening_process: All candidates undergo identity verification, a criminal background check, and employment/education verification through an accredited provider before a start date is confirmed; results are adjudicated against documented suitability criteria.
docs.positions_in_scope: All employees and contractors with logical or physical access to the system, with enhanced screening for privileged and public-trust positions.
docs.rescreening_cadence: Privileged-role holders are re-screened every 5 years and on role change; all others per contractual and regulatory triggers.
